PACKAGE 'NGFF_M2_BKEY_67PS_QEA-M3S'
CLASS IC
PINCOUNT 71

PINORDER 'M_1.2_BKEY_RM500Q_NGFF_M2_BKEY_' AP2SDX_STATUS COEX_RXD COEX_TXD CONFIG_0 CONFIG_1,
      CONFIG_2 CONFIG_3 DPR 'FULL_CARD_POWER_OFF#' GND1 GND10 GND11 GND2 GND3 GND4 GND5 GND6 GND7,

      PEREFCKN PEREFCKP PERN0 PERP0 PETN0 PETP0 RESET_N RFFE0_CLK RFFE0_DATA RFFE1_CLK RFFE1_DATA,
      RFFE_VIO_1V8 S1 S2 S3 S4 SDX2AP_STATUS 'USB3.0-RX+' 'USB3.0-RX-' 'USB3.0-TX+' 'USB3.0-TX-',
      'USB_D+' 'USB_D-' USIM1_CLK USIM1_DATA USIM1_DET USIM1_RST USIM1_VDD USIM2_CLK USIM2_DATA,
      USIM2_DET USIM2_RST USIM2_VDD VCC_1 VCC_2 VCC_3 VCC_4 VCC_5 'WAKE_ON_WAN#' WLAN_TX_EN,
      'WWAN_LED#' 'W_DISABLE1#' 'W_DISABLE2#'
FUNCTION G1 'M_1.2_BKEY_RM500Q_NGFF_M2_BKEY_' 68 64 62 21 69 75 1 25 6 3 71 73 5 11 27 33 39 45 51,
      57 59 52 50 54 20 22 24 28 53 55 41 43 47 49 67 63 61 56 58 65 S1 S2 S3 S4 38 31 29 37 35 7 9,
      32 34 66 30 36 44 42 40 46 48 74 72 70 4 2 23 60 10 8 26
